title: SPD NAN Associates IT Amendment $120K to $200K -- 1153 West Fayette Move Update
summary: First Deputy Chief Rich Trudeau presents item 32, amending NAN Associates IT services contract from $120K to $200K to cover 1153 West Fayette move IT infrastructure (door locks, cameras, network). No additional funding -- moving within existing account. Interim bridge until city IT RFP (already issued by Dave Proak) is awarded. Move update: fire completely moved to 6th floor, moving down floors, on schedule. Council asks about community room -- no designated room but training rooms with partitions available for community events. Council interested in simulation room and planned police/fire museum in public entrance.

political_signal.description: Council probes community room designation and RFP process for IT services at 1153

processing_notes: NAN Associates quarterbacking 1153 IT infrastructure. City IT RFP already out (Dave Proak). Fire moved to 6th floor first. No designated community room but flexible training spaces available. Police/fire museum planned for public entrance. Roll call room doubles as media room.
Segment 11 of 23 from Common Council Study Session, Wednesday March 18th 2026
Transcript corrections applied: CNS -> CNS Engineers; SU -> Syracuse University
Potential duplicate detected: overlaps with CTX-COUNCIL-2026-00062 -- linked, not skipped
